candidate_check.description: Windows 11 must be configured to require a minimum pin length of six characters or greater.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\PassportForWork\PINComplexity\

Value Name: MinimumPINLength

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 6 (or greater)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> System >> PIN Complexity >> "Minimum PIN length" to "6" or greater.
title: Windows 11 must be configured to require a minimum pin length of six characters or greater.
